title: justicia palustris
intro: Justicia palustris, also known as marsh justicia or marsh acacia, is a perennial herb native to tropical Asia, commonly found growing in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia palustris include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
